title: NauTec
description: Nautec is a mod about exploring the depths of the ocean, discovering new technologies both powerful and dangerous.
body: Requires **[Curios](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios-continuation) [API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios-continuation)** and **[Modonomicon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/modonomicon)** but [**Just Enough Items**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) and [**__Jade__**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jade) are **_HIGHLY_** recommended Link to the [Discord](https://discord.gg/HFT8AMzH8y)   ![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/NauTec/MP_Katrina_NauTec_header.webp) ================================================================================= Nautec is a mod about exploring the depths of the ocean, discovering new technologies both powerful and dangerous.   ![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/NauTec/MP_Katrina_NauTec_description.webp) To begin your aquatic journey you will have to find a prismarine crystal geode, located underneath a dark prismarine ruin. This ruin also contains an Aquatic Catalyst that you can use to generate your first power. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1107394/description_49f94703-8933-4a7e-9ec4-58e70f48d36a.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1107394/description_20c4bce4-2f10-49ad-8812-f1a0aa9c24e1.png)   Due to the oceans being deeper than in vanilla minecraft it is highly recommended to craft a diving suit which also removes the underwater fog effect. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1107394/description_2a1106e8-84fc-446a-88f3-6decc92ca3b2.png)![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1107394/description_f862df9e-a6d5-46a7-8a08-6586e9a564a1.png) After filling the Catalyst with a fuel like kelp (requires a hopper) and activating it using a Heart of the sea, it will generate power and send a laser beam to any block in its way with a range of 15 blocks. ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1107394/description_bd303235-9977-4ee8-9651-799245f36f75.png)    By shooting a beam into the crystal the beams purity will increase, allowing you to perform item transformtation using the laser. Item transformation is done by throwing an item in a laser. Be careful tho, they can burn you! ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1107394/description_553b36a7-19df-4e9c-ae4e-0617c09b598a.png) Throwing iron under a laser will transform it into Aquarine Steel, therefore unlocking the base material for the mod. Congrats! You have completed the pre-early game and are now able to explore the mod on your own or with the help of the guide book. **Don't forget to use JEI either!**   ![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/NauTec/MP_Katrina_NauTec_features.webp) Now that you have unlocked Aquarine Steel you can start building machines like the **mixer** to dive into deepsea chemistry, build a **deep sea drain** to accumulate tons of buckets of Salt Water and work towards building an **augmentation station** to augment your body with various
